name: -ing Angler
short_description: Idle fishing game. You don't even need to click the screen regularly! I promise it won't take long!
detailed_description:
This game is about catching lots of black bass and earning money.

But this game doesn't require any skill or technique.

I promise it won't take long. Why not try enjoying bass fishing in your spare time?

Leave me alone.

Once you start the game, there's nothing else for you to do. Feel free to watch videos, play different games, work, or do whatever you like(Keep the game running!). Before you know it, you'll be catching a lot of black bass. You'll save a lot of money too.

The rising wave of inflation

Once you have saved up some money, you can upgrade your tools. You will be able to catch bigger black bass and more of them.

By the way, black bass continue to grow in size without limit.
